verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus is in me and, Jesus is in you, Jesus is in us, For He loves us, Jesus is in me and, Jesus is in you, Jesus is in us, For He loves us.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oooh.. Therefore, We should be one, Come one another, As He has done. Oooh.. Therefore, We should be one, Come one another, As He has done.
